UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Swords card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Swords card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Swords card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Swords card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Swords card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Swords card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the cleverness of Till Eulenspiegel as he manages to secure petty victories, even when others walk away with more swords.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the broken swords or the figures walking away. Instead, focus on the smirk and triumph of Till.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Five of Swords card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, oboe, slow, melancholic, introspective, instrumental

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the hollow eyes of Cain, symbolizing regret and guilt over his fratricide.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the victory aspect as it is a hollow one, tainted by remorse.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Five of Swords card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, ambient, reversed, introspective, hopeful, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Swords card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Five of Swords card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the moment of reconsideration in Robin Hood's actions, the neutral swords left behind symbolizing a decision towards less violence.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the act of leaving, instead focus on the contemplative nature and the potential change in strategy.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Five of Swords card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-inspired ambient orchestral, harp, strings, flute, minor, introspective, thoughtful, instrumental
